title: Word cloud App - update
excerpt: Within the Word Cloud App, we would like the ability to remove ‘common words’ or a select other list of words. Currently when using this on comment fields, the biggest words always tend to come through as ‘The’ & ‘And’ e…

posts.author: jade.woodward (Jade)
posts.cookedHtml: Within the Word Cloud App, we would like the ability to remove ‘common words’ or a select other list of words. Currently when using this on comment fields, the biggest words always tend to come through as ‘The’ & ‘And’ etc. which we would like to remove.
